category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a FRED command-line interface and Python API wrapper for economic data; PyPI/GitHub describe a FRED CLI and Python API wrapper.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is "Fred CLI & Python API"; source_facts.name is fred.
docs_sources: Official PyPI and GitHub README link to fred-py-api Read the Docs, GitHub wiki, and FRED API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official PyPI project links and GitHub README identify zachspar/fred-py-api as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions CLI and Python API wrapper; GitHub topics include python, cli, finance, fred, api-wrapper, and research.
